Class ClientSession

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client.ClientSession
public final class ClientSession extends Object
Pairs a ServerConnection with a VirtualServer and adds a snapshot-replay layer: an internal dispatcher captures every server message, caches the latest lobby/game state, then forwards it to the currently attached view handler.

When a new screen registers via setHandler(ServerHandler), it immediately receives a replay of the latest known state — fixes the race where a message arrives before the view is ready.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientSession

      public ClientSession(ServerConnection connection)
      Parameters:
      connection - the open connection to wrap; its message dispatcher is set to this session's internal dispatcher

  • Method Details

    • getVirtualServer

      public VirtualServer getVirtualServer()
      Returns:
      the local proxy used to send requests to the server

    • getLocalNickname

      public String getLocalNickname()
      Returns:
      the local player's nickname, or null if not joined yet

    • getLatestLobbyState

      public LobbyStateDTO getLatestLobbyState()
      Returns:
      the latest cached lobby state, or null if none received yet

    • getLatestTotemSelectionState

      public TotemSelectionStateDTO getLatestTotemSelectionState()
      Returns:
      the latest cached totem-selection state, or null if none received yet

    • getLatestGameState

      public GameStateDTO getLatestGameState()
      Returns:
      the latest cached game state, or null if none received yet

    • isGameStarted

      public boolean isGameStarted()
      Returns:
      whether the match has started

    • setHandler

      public void setHandler(ServerHandler handler)
      Registers the active view handler. If a lobby/game snapshot is already available, replays it to the new handler so the screen starts in sync.
      Parameters:
      handler - the new view handler, or null to detach

    • clearLocalMatchState

      public void clearLocalMatchState()
      Resets local match state (snapshots + virtual-server binding) but keeps the connection. Used both when the server sends MatchClosedMessage and on voluntary leave; afterwards the session is reusable for list/create/join.

    • close

      public void close(boolean notifyServer)
      Closes the session.
      Parameters:
      notifyServer - when true and a lobby was joined, tells the server we are leaving before closing the channel
